UI_P4HasBeenRead_Options_EnableTargets_T:
You can choose which item types to show marks on.
Items marked with * will only be recorded as read if they were read after enabling this mod.
UI_P4HasBeenRead_Options_ShowMarks_Toolt: You can choose which marks to show.
UI_P4HasBeenRead_Options_ShowCT_Tooltip: Select the check box if you want to show mark on skill books you currently need to read or effective VHS.
UI_P4HasBeenRead_Options_ShowSM_Tooltip: Select the check box if you want to show "Self Marking" mark.
UI_P4HasBeenRead_Options_ShowSM_Marked: Display a mark (pencil) on marked items
UI_P4HasBeenRead_Options_ShowSM_Unmarked: Display a mark (eraser) on unmarked items
UI_P4HasBeenRead_Options_AutoMark_Toolti:
When the check box is turned ON, the book will be automatically marked when retrieved.
It can also be temporarily enabled or disabled from the context menu.
UI_P4HasBeenRead_Messages_ToDoAutoMark: Enabled auto marking when the book is retrieved.
UI_P4HasBeenRead_Messages_ToDoNotAutoMar: Disabled auto marking when the book is retrieved.
